title: Masked Menace's
description: This a a palladium addon that adds 1 Spider-Man power, 3Spider-Mann suits, and a way to get the powers in survival mode
body:
WebSling – Palladium Addon

WebSling is a Palladium addon that brings classic Spider-style movement into Minecraft. This addon introduces three unique suits inspired by legendary web-slingers: the Peter, the Miles, and a fully Custom Suit.

WebSling features one powerful spider ability that allows players to swing through the world using webs, giving fast, fluid, and dynamic movement across cities, forests, and builds. The ability is designed to feel smooth and satisfying while staying balanced for survival gameplay.



[Discord](https://discord.gg/jEUCbwtg)
